text:
On Sun, Jul 5, 2009 at 10:28 AM, Beat Gaetzi<beat@freebsd.org> wrote:
> I tried to fix the tinderbox errors:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~beat/patches/136144-dislin-9.5.patch
>
> Could you please test if this version is working and if the changes are
> fine for you.
>

Hi.

This patch works for me, and builds correctly on -CURRENT using porttools.

Thanks.

-- 
Glen Barber
